mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, t1.tag1_name FROM tag1 t1 LEFT OUTER JOIN recipe_tag rt ON t1.id = rt.tag1_id GROUP BY rt.tag1_id, t1.id, t1.tag1_name ORDER BY count(rt.tag1_id) DESC LIMIT 12;
select t1.id from tag1 t1 where not EXISTS( select rt.tag1_id from recipe_tag rt where rt.tag1_id = t1.id )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tag1 SET display_flg = false WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: select t2.id from tag2 t2 where not EXISTS( select rt.tag2_id from recipe_tag2 rt where rt.tag2_id = t2.id )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tag2 SET display_flg = false WHERE id IN
#{id}
